features: Guard Active Job now prioritizes assigned marketplace_jobs for the logged-in guard
Guard lifecycle includes assigned, accept job, en route, arrived, in progress, proof uploaded, and completed
Guard status actions update marketplace_jobs.current_status instead of inventing local-only status
Every status action writes job_events for agency/platform/client status tracking
Proof uploads can attach directly to marketplace_job_id
Completed guard marketplace jobs appear in the guard Completed view
